evidence_summary: Execute the political climax of the Thark arc through a formal council confrontation and sanctioned duel. The sequence must transition from verbal defiance to high-tension combat, concluding with a definitive shift in leadership hierarchy. Production must p...

In a formal council, John Carter challenges Tal Hajus's leadership based on his cowardice. This leads to a sanctioned duel between Tars Tarkas and Tal Hajus. Tars Tarkas emerges victorious, becoming Jeddak and elevating Carter to chieftain status.
